item.title: What is a Deep Fake?
item.description: A clear explanation of deepfakes—AI-generated media that can alter faces or voices—and how they are created, used, and identified.

media:content.media:title: What is a Deep Fake?
media:content.media:description: A clear explanation of deepfakes—AI-generated media that can alter faces or voices—and how they are created, used, and identified.

item.title: What Might Be Inside a Black Hole?
item.description: A science-based look at what theories suggest about the interior of black holes, and why their true nature remains one of physics’ biggest mysteries.

media:content.media:title: What Might Be Inside a Black Hole?
media:content.media:description: A science-based look at what theories suggest about the interior of black holes, and why their true nature remains one of physics’ biggest mysteries.

item.title: A Thought-Provoking Fact to Consider
item.description: A reflective look at a surprising scientific or philosophical fact that offers a new perspective on how we understand the world.

media:content.media:title: A Thought-Provoking Fact to Consider
media:content.media:description: A reflective look at a surprising scientific or philosophical fact that offers a new perspective on how we understand the world.

item.title: Do We Need More Phone Numbers?
item.description: A look at how phone numbering systems work and whether growing demand could require new formats or expansions in the future.

media:content.media:title: Do We Need More Phone Numbers?
media:content.media:description: A look at how phone numbering systems work and whether growing demand could require new formats or expansions in the future.

item.title: A Scientist's View of War
item.description: An analytical look at how scientists examine the causes, impacts, and technological aspects of war from a research-based perspective.

media:content.media:title: A Scientist's View of War
media:content.media:description: An analytical look at how scientists examine the causes, impacts, and technological aspects of war from a research-based perspective.

item.title: What Is the Tallest Mountain on Earth?
item.description: A clear explanation of how scientists measure mountain height, and why Mount Everest is considered the tallest above sea level.

media:content.media:title: What Is the Tallest Mountain on Earth?
media:content.media:description: A clear explanation of how scientists measure mountain height, and why Mount Everest is considered the tallest above sea level.

item.title: What Is the Equivalence Principle?
item.description: A clear explanation of the equivalence principle, a key idea in physics showing how gravity and acceleration can be indistinguishable in certain conditions.

media:content.media:title: What Is the Equivalence Principle?
media:content.media:description: A clear explanation of the equivalence principle, a key idea in physics showing how gravity and acceleration can be indistinguishable in certain conditions.

item.title: How Cold Does Freezing Water Get?
item.description: A clear explanation of water’s freezing point and how temperature, pressure, and impurities can affect how cold it gets as it turns to ice.

media:content.media:title: How Cold Does Freezing Water Get?
media:content.media:description: A clear explanation of water’s freezing point and how temperature, pressure, and impurities can affect how cold it gets as it turns to ice.

item.title: Do Wormholes Hold Space-Time Together?
item.description: A science-based look at wormholes, what physics suggests about them, and whether they play any role in the structure of space-time.

media:content.media:title: Do Wormholes Hold Space-Time Together?
media:content.media:description: A science-based look at wormholes, what physics suggests about them, and whether they play any role in the structure of space-time.

item.title: Are you still salty about Pluto?
item.description: A simple comparison of Pluto’s size with other planets, explaining why its small scale influenced its reclassification.

media:content.media:title: Are you still salty about Pluto?
media:content.media:description: A simple comparison of Pluto’s size with other planets, explaining why its small scale influenced its reclassification.

item.title: Neil deGrasse Tyson on Video Games
item.description: A look at Neil deGrasse Tyson’s perspective on video games, including how they can inspire interest in science and technology.

media:content.media:title: Neil deGrasse Tyson on Video Games
media:content.media:description: A look at Neil deGrasse Tyson’s perspective on video games, including how they can inspire interest in science and technology.

item.title: “Don’t Look Up” as Social Commentary
item.description: A look at how the film Don't Look Up uses satire to reflect real-world issues, and why some viewers see it as commentary on modern society.

media:content.media:title: “Don’t Look Up” as Social Commentary
media:content.media:description: A look at how the film Don't Look Up uses satire to reflect real-world issues, and why some viewers see it as commentary on modern society.

item.title: Can We Create Artificial Gravity?
item.description: A look at how scientists and engineers explore ways to simulate gravity, including rotation and acceleration, for use in space travel.

media:content.media:title: Can We Create Artificial Gravity?
media:content.media:description: A look at how scientists and engineers explore ways to simulate gravity, including rotation and acceleration, for use in space travel.
